title: To Your Eternity
sourceNotes: Three TV seasons map to the now-complete manga (ended June 2025 at chapter 201 / 25 volumes; AniList's '202 chapters' counts split chapters). Cumulative episodes: S1 (id 114535, 20 eps) = eps 1-20; S2 (id 138565, 20 eps) = eps 21-40; S3 (id 162669, 22 eps) = eps 41-62. S1 adapts ch 1-54 (early Past Era through into Jananda Island). S2 adapts ch 55-116, finishing the Past Era at the close of the Renril/Nokker War. S3 adapts the Modern Era from ch 117 to roughly ch 165; the season endpoint is approximate (mid-160s). The Future Arc (ch ~166-201) is unadapted. No theatrical films ('The Roots of To Your Eternity' is a documentary special, not a movie).

mappings.arc: Past Era: awakening & early lives (into Jananda Island)
Jananda finale, Guardians & Renril / Nokker War
